name: place-type-discovery-mvp
title: 多地点类型发现筛选 MVP
creator: lijin
notes:
2026-04-27: Implemented frontend-only multi-place-type discovery MVP as a child of the Place/Home product decision. Added a pure place type derivation helper and script test; discovery page now offers discoverable place-type chips and shows type badges; preview modal shows type badge. Home is recognized as a reserved type but excluded from public discovery chips. No backend/schema/payload write changes.

2026-04-27 correction: Completed status covers only the frontend-only, payload-derived discovery filter MVP. Deferred/not done: backend/API/contracts, docs/WORLD_SCHEMA.md, persistent place_type/Place/Home/Member/Relationship fields, Home/family-member/school-sync/relationship-graph implementation, and create/update payload writes.

2026-04-27 follow-up: The deferred backend/schema/Home/member/school relationship items listed above were implemented and verified in child task 04-27-place-home-full-mvp. This does not change the original discovery task scope; it records where the follow-up completion now lives.
